defaultValue.Query: SELECT * FROM SalesLT.Customer WHERE CustomerID > 100 AND CustomerID < 1000

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CustomerCount
FROM SalesLT.Customer

SELECT LastModifiedDate
FROM SalesLT.WatermarkTable
WHERE TableName='Customer'

SELECT MAX(ModifiedDate) AS LatestDate
FROM SalesLT.Customer

SELECT COUNT(*) AS CustomerCount
FROM SalesLT.Customer
